# UI/UX Pro Max Skill

## When to Use

- Designing user interfaces for web or mobile apps
- Improving user experience and usability
- Creating wireframes, mockups, or prototypes
- Suggesting design patterns and best practices
- Generating code for UI components

## Procedure

1. Describe the design requirements or problem
2. Provide context about the target platform (web, mobile, etc.)
3. Specify any existing designs or constraints
4. The skill will assist in generating ideas, code, or suggestions

## Resources

- [Design Guidelines](./references/design-guidelines.md)
- [Component Library](./assets/components/)
